title: fimbristylis hawaiiensis
intro: Fimbristylis hawaiiensis, also known as the Hawaiian fimbry, is a type of sedge plant native to Hawaii. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Fimbristylis hawaiiensis can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas or infusions, and is also used in traditional Hawaiian medicine to treat various ailments.
